name: Chocolate Covered Cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. DRAIN THE CHERRIES FOR SEVERAL HOURS.
2. COMBINE THE SOFTENED BUTTER AND CORN SYRUP.
3. STIR IN THE POWDERED SUGAR UNTIL WELL BLEND.
4. CHILL IF NECESSARY TO ALLOW IT TO SET.
5. SHAPE ABOUT HALF A TEASPOON OF MIXTURE AROUND EACH CHERRY.
6. PLACE THE COATED CHERRIES ONTO A BAKING SHEET LINED WITH WAX PAPER.
7. CHILL UNTIL THEY ARE FIRM ENOUGH TO HANDLE.
8. DIP EACH CHERRY INTO THE MOLDED CHOCOLATE BY THE STEM.
9. STORE IN THE REFRIGERATOR FOR 1 TO 2 WEEKS BEFORE SERVING.
